description: Page title is generic ('Sample Page') - not descriptive or keyword-rich
recommendation: Use a descriptive, keyword-rich title under 60 characters that reflects page content

description: Missing meta description tag
recommendation: Add a <meta name="description" content="..."> tag with a compelling summary of 150-160 characters

description: No structured data (JSON-LD) present
recommendation: Add JSON-LD structured data (e.g., WebPage, Organization) for rich search results

description: Missing Open Graph and Twitter Card meta tags
recommendation: Add og:title, og:description, og:image and twitter:card meta tags for social sharing

description: No canonical URL specified
recommendation: Add <link rel="canonical" href="..."> to prevent duplicate content issues

description: No hreflang tag for internationalization
recommendation: If targeting multiple languages, add hreflang link tags

description: Image missing alt attribute (logo.png)
recommendation: Add descriptive alt text to all images for accessibility and image SEO

description: No sitemap or robots.txt reference
recommendation: Ensure sitemap.xml exists and is referenced, and robots.txt is properly configured

description: Image lacks descriptive alt text ('Promo' is vague)
recommendation: Use descriptive alt text that conveys the image's content and purpose

description: Duplicate id='card-item' when Card is rendered in a list
recommendation: Use unique ids per element; duplicate ids harm accessibility and can confuse crawlers

description: Only one H1 per page is recommended; verify heading hierarchy across all components
recommendation: Ensure a single H1 per page with proper H2-H6 nesting for content structure

description: Render-blocking external CSS in <head> without preload or async strategy
recommendation: Use <link rel="preload"> or media="print" onload pattern to avoid render-blocking CSS

description: @font-face missing font-display: swap - causes invisible text during load (FOIT)
recommendation: Add font-display: swap to @font-face declarations

description: Image missing width and height attributes - causes Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS)
recommendation: Always specify width and height on tags to reserve space and prevent CLS

description: Below-fold image missing loading="lazy" attribute
recommendation: Add loading="lazy" to images below the fold to defer offscreen image loading

description: Layout thrashing: reading offsetHeight then writing style.minHeight in sequence
recommendation: Batch DOM reads and writes separately, or use requestAnimationFrame for writes

description: Dynamic content insertion via setTimeout without size reservation causes CLS
recommendation: Reserve space for dynamic content with min-height or skeleton placeholders

description: Inline <script> in body without defer/async blocks HTML parsing
recommendation: Move scripts to external files with defer attribute, or place at end of body

description: Hero image not using modern format (WebP/AVIF) or <picture> element
recommendation: Use <picture> with WebP/AVIF sources and PNG/JPG fallback for smaller file sizes

description: Hero image lacks srcset for responsive serving
recommendation: Add srcset and sizes attributes for responsive images to serve appropriate sizes

description: External CSS loaded from CDN without resource hints
recommendation: Add <link rel="preconnect"> for third-party origins to reduce connection time

description: console.log left in production code - minor perf overhead and information leak
recommendation: Remove console.log statements from production code or use a logger with level control

description: document.querySelector in event handler instead of React ref
recommendation: Use React refs instead of direct DOM queries for better performance and safety

description: List items rendered without key prop - causes unnecessary re-renders
recommendation: Add a stable, unique key prop to each list item for efficient React reconciliation

description: No HTTP caching headers strategy indicated for static assets
recommendation: Configure Cache-Control headers for static assets (CSS, images, fonts)

description: innerHTML usage with user input is an XSS risk and bypasses virtual DOM
recommendation: Use textContent instead of innerHTML, or sanitize input; in React use state-driven rendering

description: Font file loaded without preload hint
recommendation: Add <link rel="preload" as="font" type="font/woff2" crossorigin> for critical fonts

description: No evidence of code splitting or lazy loading for route components
recommendation: Use React.lazy() and Suspense for route-level code splitting

description: No Subresource Integrity (SRI) hash on external CDN resource
recommendation: Add integrity and crossorigin attributes to external script/style tags for security and cache benefits
